flags.message: Decisive forward signal from a companion case, disclosed per the retrieval contract: the Court granted certiorari in the vided companion RNC v. Mi Familia Vota (25-1017) around 2026-06-29/07-02 (predates the provisioned 2026-07-17 snapshot), while this petition (25-1019) shows no action after the 6/25 conference — i.e., it is being held. This petition's own disposition remains undecided; the prediction treats it as a held same-judgment companion (modal outcome denial, material GVR probability).
